android.widget.TextView.text: Dak Prescott, Fiancée Sarah Jane Ramos Call Off Wedding After Bachelorette Party

android.view.View.text: Dallas Cowboys quarterback Dak Prescott and fiancee Sarah Jane Ramos pose on the NFL Honors Red Carpet before Super Bowl LX | Kirby Lee-Imagn Images
android.view.View.heading: false

android.widget.TextView.text: , have called off their wedding just one month before it was set to take place in Italy, according to a report from
android.widget.TextView.heading: false
